H7701.kjv_def: desolation, destruction, oppression, robbery, spoil(-ed, -er, -ing), wasting.
H7701.usage: spoil(10x), destruction(7x), desolation(2x), robbery(2x), wasting(2x), oppression(1x), spoiler(1x)

H7703.strongs_def: properly, to be burly, i.e. (figuratively) powerful (passively, impregnable); by implication, to ravage
H7703.kjv_def: dead, destroy(-er), oppress, robber, spoil(-er), [idiom] utterly, (lay) waste.

H7704.derivation: or שָׂדַי; from an unused root meaning to spread out;
H7704.kjv_def: country, field, ground, land, soil, [idiom] wild.
H7704.usage: field(292x), country(17x), land(11x), wild(8x), ground(4x), soil(1x)

H7705.strongs_def: a wife (as mistress of the house)

H7706.pos: masculine noun with reference to deity

H7707.derivation: from the same as H7704 (שָׂדֶה) and H217 (אוּר); spreader of light;

H7708.derivation: plural from the same as H7704 (שָׂדֶה); flats;

H7713.derivation: from an unused root meaning to regulate;
H7713.strongs_def: a row, i.e. rank (of soldiers), story (of rooms)

H7714.strongs_def: Shadrak, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions

H7715.strongs_def: {Shadrak, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions}

H7716.derivation: or שֵׂי; probably from H7582 (שָׁאָה) through the idea of pushing out to graze;
H7716.strongs_def: a member of a flock, i.e. a sheep or goat
H7716.kjv_def: (lesser, small) cattle, ewe, goat, lamb, sheep. Compare H2089 (זֶה).

H7717.derivation: from an unused root meaning to testify;

H7718.derivation: from an unused root probably mean to blanch;
H7718.strongs_def: a gem, probably the beryl (from its pale green color)

H7720.strongs_def: a round pendant for the neck
H7720.kjv_def: ornament, round tire like the moon.

H7721.derivation: from an unused root (akin to H5375 (נָשָׂא) and H7722 (שׁוֹא)) meaning to rise;

H7722.derivation: or (feminine) שׁוֹאָה; or שֹׁאָה; from an unused root meaning to rush over;
H7722.usage: desolation(5x), destruction(3x), desolate(2x), destroy(1x), storm(1x), wasteness(1x)

H7723.derivation: or שַׁו; from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא) in the sense of desolating;
H7723.strongs_def: evil (as destructive), literally (ruin) or morally (especially guile); figuratively idolatry (as false, subjective), uselessness (as deceptive, objective; also adverbially, in vain)
H7723.usage: vain(22x), vanity(22x), false(5x), lying(2x), falsely(1x), lies(1x)

H7724.derivation: from the same as H7723 (שָׁוְא); false;

H7725.strongs_def: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
H7725.kjv_def: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom] in any case (wise), [idiom] at all, averse, bring (again, back, home again), call (to mind), carry again (back), cease, [idiom] certainly, come again (back), [idiom] consider, [phrase] continually, convert, deliver (again), [phrase] deny, draw back, fetch home again, [idiom] fro, get (oneself) (back) again, [idiom] give (again), go again (back, home), (go) out, hinder, let, (see) more, [idiom] needs, be past, [idiom] pay, pervert, pull in again, put (again, up again), recall, recompense, recover, refresh, relieve, render (again), requite, rescue, restore, retrieve, (cause to, make to) return, reverse, reward, [phrase] say nay, send back, set again, slide back, still, [idiom] surely, take back (off), (cause to, make to) turn (again, self again, away, back, back again, backward, from, off), withdraw.
H7725.usage: return(391x), turn(123x), restore(39x), bring(34x), render(19x), answer(18x), recompense(8x), recover(6x), deliver(5x), put(5x), withdraw(5x), requite(4x)

H7727.strongs_def: Shobab, the name of two Israelites

H7732.derivation: from the same as H7640 (שֹׁבֶל); overflowing;
H7732.strongs_def: Shobal, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites

H7733.derivation: active participle from a primitive root meaning to leave (compare H7662 (שְׁבַק)); forsaking;

H7736.strongs_def: properly, to swell up, i.e. figuratively (by implication of insolence) to devastate

H7737.strongs_def: properly, to level, i.e. equalize; figuratively, to resemble; by implication, to adjust (i.e. counterbalance, be suitable, compose, place, yield, etc.)
H7737.kjv_def: avail, behave, bring forth, compare, countervail, (be, make) equal, lay, be (make, a-) like, make plain, profit, reckon.
H7737.usage: laid(3x), equal(3x), like(2x), compared(2x), profit(2x), set(1x)

H7741.derivation: from the same as H7740 (שָׁוֵה) and the dual of H7151 (קִרְיָה); plain of a double city;
H7741.strongs_def: Shaveh-Kirjathajim, a place East of the Jordan

H7747.strongs_def: a Shuchite or descendant of Shuach

H7750.derivation: or (by permutation) סוּט; a primitive root;
H7750.strongs_def: to detrude, i.e. (intransitively and figuratively) become derelict (wrongly practise; namely, idolatry)

H7751.strongs_def: properly, to push forth; (but used only figuratively) to lash, i.e. (the sea with oars) to row; by implication, to travel
H7751.kjv_def: go (about, through, to and fro), mariner, rower, run to and fro.

H7753.strongs_def: to entwine, i.e. shut in (for formation, protection or restraint)

H7755.derivation: or שֹׂכֹה; or שׂוֹכוֹ; from H7753 (שׂוּךְ);
H7755.strongs_def: Sokoh or Soko, the name of two places in Palestine
H7755.usage: Socoh(2x), Shochoh(2x), Sochoh(1x), Shoco(1x), Socho(1x), Shocho(1x)

H7756.derivation: probably patronymic from a name corresponding to H7754 (שׂוֹךְ) (feminine);
H7756.strongs_def: a Sukathite or descendant of an unknown Israelite named Sukah

H7757.derivation: from an unused root meaning to hang down;
H7757.strongs_def: a skirt; by implication, a bottom edge

H7759.strongs_def: peaceful (with the article always prefixed, making it a pet name); the Shulammith, an epithet of Solomon's queen

H7760.strongs_def: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
H7760.kjv_def: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, impute, lay (down, up), leave, look, make (out), mark, [phrase] name, [idiom] on, ordain, order, [phrase] paint, place, preserve, purpose, put (on), [phrase] regard, rehearse, reward, (cause to) set (on, up), shew, [phrase] stedfastly, take, [idiom] tell, [phrase] tread down, (over-)turn, [idiom] wholly, work.
H7760.usage: put(155x), make(123x), set(119x), lay(64x), appoint(19x), give(11x), consider(8x), turn(5x), brought(4x), ordain(3x), place(3x), take(3x), shew(2x), regard(2x), mark(2x), disposed(2x), care(2x)

H7761.strongs_def: {to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)}
H7761.kjv_def: [phrase] command, give, lay, make, [phrase] name, [phrase] regard, set.
H7761.usage: made(15x), commanded(3x), give(2x), laid(2x), have(1x), named(1x)

H7762.derivation: from an unused root meaning to exhale;

H7763.derivation: or שֹׁמֵר; active participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר); keeper;
H7763.strongs_def: Shomer, the name of two Israelites

H7764.derivation: from an unused root meaning to rest; quiet;

H7765.strongs_def: a Shunite (collectively) or descendants of Shuni

H7766.derivation: probably from the same as H7764 (שׁוּנִי); quietly;

H7767.strongs_def: a Shunammitess, or female inhabitant of Shunem

H7768.strongs_def: properly, to be free; but used only causatively and reflexively, to halloo (for help, i.e. freedom from some trouble)

H7771.derivation: from H7768 (שָׁוַע) in the original sense of freedom;
H7771.strongs_def: a noble, i.e. liberal, opulent; also (as noun in the derived sense) a halloo

H7776.derivation: or שֻׁעָל; from the same as H8168 (שֹׁעַל);

H7777.strongs_def: Shual, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine

H7778.derivation: or שֹׁעֵר active participle of H8176 (שָׁעַר) (as denominative from H8179 (שַׁעַר));

H7779.strongs_def: properly, to gape, i.e. snap at; figuratively, to overwhelm

H7781.strongs_def: a Shuphamite (collectively) or descendants of Shephupham

H7782.derivation: or שֹׁפָר; from H8231 (שָׁפַר) in the original sense of incising;
H7782.strongs_def: a cornet (as giving a clear sound) or curved horn

H7783.strongs_def: to run after or over, i.e. overflow

H7786.strongs_def: properly, to vanquish; by implication, to rule (causatively, crown)
H7786.kjv_def: make princes, have power, reign. See H5493 (סוּר).

H7787.derivation: a primitive root (identical with H7786 (שׂוּר) through the idea of reducing to pieces; compare H4883 (מַשּׂוֹר));

H7788.strongs_def: properly, to turn, i.e. travel about (as a harlot or a merchant)

H7789.derivation: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of going round for inspection);
H7789.strongs_def: to spy out, i.e. (generally) survey, (for evil) lurk for, (for good) care for
H7789.kjv_def: behold, lay wait, look, observe, perceive, regard, see.
H7789.usage: behold(5x), see(4x), look(2x), observe(2x), regard(1x), perceive(1x)

H7793.strongs_def: Shur, a region of the Desert

H7794.kjv_def: bull(-ock), cow, ox, wall (by mistake for H7791 (שׁוּר)).

H7795.derivation: from H7786 (שׂוּר) in the primitive sense of H5493 (סוּר);
H7795.strongs_def: properly, a ring, i.e. (by analogy) a row (adverbially)

H7796.derivation: the same as H8321 (שֹׂרֵק); a vine;

H7797.kjv_def: be glad, [idiom] greatly, joy, make mirth, rejoice.

H7799.derivation: or שׁוֹשָׁן; or שֹׁשָׁן; and (feminine) שׁוֹשַׁנָּה; from H7797 (שׂוּשׂ);
H7799.strongs_def: a lily (from its whiteness), as aflower of architectural ornament; also a (straight) trumpet (from the tubular shape)
